description: Owner-editable initial prompt-tier presets. Experience overlays may change unlocked entries later; safety-locked entries remain rare.

chromie.speak.reason: Speech is a normal fast-lane ability for mixed chat and body tasks.

chromie.memory.remember.reason: Remembering user preferences is a common conversation lane when the memory tool exists.

chromie.memory.recall.reason: Recalling user preferences is a common conversation lane when the memory tool exists.

soridormi.blink_eyes.reason: Simple social expression commonly requested in conversation.

soridormi.look_direction.reason: Simple gaze behavior commonly requested in conversation.

soridormi.nod_yes.reason: Simple acknowledgement gesture commonly requested in conversation.

soridormi.shake_no.reason: Simple refusal gesture commonly requested in conversation.

soridormi.sidestep.reason: Bounded locomotion primitive commonly requested in conversation.

soridormi.stand_idle.reason: Safe idle posture is a common body-control request.

soridormi.stop.reason: Stop is common in the skill list, while emergency interruption remains deterministic.

soridormi.turn_in_place.reason: Bounded orientation primitive commonly requested in conversation.

soridormi.walk_forward.reason: Bounded forward locomotion primitive commonly requested in conversation.
